inputs.label: Starting Weight
inputs.businessContext: Initial body weight before starting yo-yo diet cycle

inputs.label: Daily Weight Loss During Diet
inputs.businessContext: Average weight loss per day during active dieting phase

inputs.label: Diet Duration
inputs.businessContext: Number of days on the diet

inputs.label: Daily Weight Gain After Diet
inputs.businessContext: Average weight gain per day after stopping diet

inputs.label: Post-Diet Duration
inputs.businessContext: Number of days after diet to evaluate yo-yo effect

inputs.label: Number of Cycles
inputs.businessContext: Number of complete yo-yo diet cycles (diet + post-diet phase)
